PLEASE CONFIRM AND CHECK THE RELEVANT NOTIFICATION BELOW

•
100% Experimental Project. ZKFair is the first ZK-Rollup on ethereum based on Polygon CDK and Celestia DA. ZKFair Team is only responsible for providing innovative technical solutions. ZKFair Team is not responsible for the actions or results of ZKFair.
•
100% Community Driven. ZKFair will be fully governed by the community after the end of airdrop. 11 Community Governors will be voted by the community and will be fully responsible for all matters of ZKFair in the future. ZKFair Team is not involved in the management of ZKFair and does not participate in any marketing and BD activities.
•
100% Funding Risk. ZKFair has the potential to succeed or fail. You may lose 100% of your money on ZKFair due to technical bugs, hacking or any other potential problems. Please make sure you can take all the risks.
•
100% Fair Launch. No Investors, No Reservations, No Pre-mining. 100% ZKF tokens will be airdropped to community after the mainnet launch. There will be no future issuance of ZKF tokens
